creator: beppo@mailbox.org
text:
Well I don't think so. Is there any alternative solution? I would be a pity if sssd will be removed on 2020-12-31.

"...                   The mail system

<lukas.slebodnik@intrak.sk>: host mail.intrak.sk[147.232.191.3] said: 550 5.1.1
    <lukas.slebodnik@intrak.sk>: Recipient address rejected: User unknown in
    virtual mailbox table (in reply to RCPT TO command)"
